nodes.label: \nTemplate API: public list/get and admin CRUD (create, update, soft delete).\n
GET /api/templates/<id>     Returns template with regions and svg_content. 404
GET /api/admin/templates     Returns all templates (active and inactive), order
GET /api/admin/templates/<id>     Returns template including svg_content for ad
POST /api/admin/templates     Body: name, description?, category?, svg_content,
PUT /api/admin/templates/<id>     Body: name?, description?, category?, svg_con
DELETE /api/admin/templates/<id>     If ?hard=true is passed, permanently delet
